title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 390.101 - Common carrier may discontinue service, when
text:
390.101.  Common carrier may discontinue service, when. — No common carrier authorized under the provisions of this chapter to operate within the state of Missouri shall abandon, discontinue, or fail to provide any service established or authorized to be established under the provisions of this chapter, unless such action is authorized by the division of motor carrier and railroad safety.
(RSMo 1939 § 5725, A.L. 1951 p. 547 § 390.100, A.L. 1986 H.B. 1428) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 5268 
Division of motor carrier and railroad safety abolished, duties and functions transferred to highways and transportation commission and department of transportation, 226.008
